reviews.comment:
Parada obligada camino a BsAs.
Siempre igual. Quizás si fuera un poquito más rápido la atención en la eterna fila para pagar ó pedir la gente no se quejaría tanto

(Translated by Google)
A must-stop on the way to Buenos Aires.
Always the same. Perhaps if the service were a little faster in the endless queue to pay or order, people wouldn't complain so much.
